description: Adding a new framework detector to detect-stack.mjs is the canonical kit-development scenario. Exercises the layered template structure + tests/ co-update discipline.
input: Benchmark task: implement Hono framework detection. You must make exactly these file changes using Edit or MultiEdit, not Bash-generated rewrites: (1) edit `src/core/detect-stack.mjs` so package.json dependencies containing `"hono"` return `{ framework: "hono", preset: "node-api" }`; (2) edit `tests/detect-stack.test.mjs` to add a fixture/test proving Hono detection. Run `node --test tests/detect-stack.test.mjs` or `npm test` and report the result. Do not change config, README, or unrelated files.
